---
title: "Timothy Hartzog"
subtitle: "AI Solutions & Data Engineering"
page-layout: full
toc: false
---

::: {.hero-banner}

# Turn Your Data Into [Decisions]{.accent}

We build AI-powered tools, interactive data analysis platforms, and custom
software that help businesses move faster with confidence.

[Explore Blog](/blog/){.btn .btn-primary} [Get in Touch](about.qmd){.btn .btn-outline-light}

:::

## What We Build

::: {.grid}

::: {.g-col-6 .g-col-md-3}
### Data Analysis & Visualization
Interactive dashboards and reports built with modern tools for high-performance computation.
:::

::: {.g-col-6 .g-col-md-3}
### AI & Machine Learning
Custom AI solutions from prototype to production with measurable ROI.
:::

::: {.g-col-6 .g-col-md-3}
### Technical Training
Hands-on workshops for teams building data literacy and AI capabilities.
:::

::: {.g-col-6 .g-col-md-3}
### Software Development
High-performance web applications built with Rust, WebAssembly, and modern frontends.
:::

:::

## Latest Posts

::: {#latest-posts}
:::
